query: Just merged the new /api/orders endpoint and the frontend OrderList component that calls it. I want to detect any field name mismatch or type drift between the OpenAPI spec and the React fetch hooks before this hits prod.
After the WASM rebuild, our TypeScript bindings to the geometry module might have drift on the Coord3D struct (x/y/z order vs y/x/z). Run boundary contract tests across the WASM↔TS interface.
We just changed the DB schema for the events table — added 2 columns, renamed one. Need to verify the application layer reads/writes still match. Run boundary tests on the events table contract.

I keep getting weird parsing errors after the API team renamed `userId` → `user_id` in some endpoints. Detect all the boundary mismatches between our API responses and the TypeScript types in src/types/api/.
yo we shipped a postgres migration and im paranoid about app code drift. boundary check on the user_account / order_history tables pls

Generate and run boundary contract tests for the encoding conversion between our internal UTF-8 strings and the legacy SJIS export. Specifically the customer name + address fields in src/export/legacy.ts.
impl-orchestrator just finished the inventory component. Run boundary-test as the final gate to catch any DB↔App schema drift or REST contract mismatch before I review.
We have unit conversion (cm→mm) happening in 3 places between the parser and the renderer. Detect any boundary contract violations in the conversion path src/parser/ → src/render/.
wasm <-> ts type contract check on the math module pls. just rebuilt geo.wasm and i bet something is off with the matrix layout
Run all boundary tests after the API schema update — REST↔Frontend and DB↔App layers. I want type mismatches surfaced as a list with file:line refs.
There's a bug in the formatDate function — it's returning UTC instead of local time. Fix it and verify the regression tests don't break.
Implement the inventory component end-to-end from DESIGN/05_inventory.md, including the boundary tests if needed.
The login button on the homepage is misaligned on mobile breakpoint. Can you fix the CSS in src/components/Header.css?
Help me write integration tests for the search endpoint using Playwright — UI flow validation.
Compare DESIGN/05_inventory.md against the implementation in src/inventory/ and tell me what's missing or diverged.
What's the best way to mock REST APIs in a React test suite? MSW vs nock vs custom?
Deep security review on the API authentication code in src/api/auth/. Find injection vectors and authorization issues.
Quick PR review on the changes to handlers/order.ts — Critical/Warning/Info levels, 5 min max.
Add a logging middleware that captures request/response bodies for the /api/orders endpoint.
Audit the design docs under DESIGN/ for type name inconsistencies and constant drift between docs.
